evals.name: default-extraction
evals.prompt: You are testing the /learn skill's extraction step. Read the SKILL.md provided, focus on its Step 3 brief, then act as the extraction subagent that step describes. The input bundle is at C:/Users/Toma/.claude/skills/learn-workspace/iteration-2/inputs/learn_bundle.md. Project is cz_dev_rag, root C:/Users/Toma/projects/cz_dev_rag, today's date 2026-04-29, user hint is empty (none). Save your output (the JSON or NO_LEARNINGS) to <output_path>. Write only the payload to that file — no preamble, no commentary, no fences.
assertions: Output file exists
Output is valid JSON or the literal string NO_LEARNINGS
Output does not start with code fence (```)
Output does not contain conversational preamble (e.g., 'Here is', 'I have', 'Let me')
If JSON: has both 'learnings' and 'memory_entries' keys
Output does not mention RAGAS_LLM_MODEL (env var that does not exist in .env.example or transcripts)
Output does not mention OLLAMA_NUM_GPU (similar — fabricated knob)
Output references at least one real session topic (Ragas, OLLAMA, LightRAG, ingestion, BGE-M3, or similar)
